refnamediv.refpurpose: Quantize image intensities into numbered regions.

listitem.para: Input grayscale or RGB image. RGB input is converted to grayscale.
Threshold edges. If a scalar is provided, thresholds are estimated with immultithresh.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Assigns each pixel to an interval defined by the sorted threshold vector. Output labels start at one.

refsection.title: Examples
